recommendations: Add a minimal smoke-test suite (import + instantiate key classes like EBM/RadiativeConvectiveModel + run 1–2 timesteps) and ensure it is wired into CI
Fix dependency metadata detection issues by modernizing packaging (complete `pyproject.toml` with core/optional extras and keep `setup.py` only as thin legacy shim)
Add explicit optional-dependency test matrix in GitHub Actions (base
xarray
radiation/rrtm extras) with graceful skips for missing compiled extensions
Deduplicate MCP endpoints (the insolation functions appear twice) and normalize endpoint naming/casing for a cleaner API surface
Add strict input/output schemas (Pydantic models) for MCP tools around arrays/fields to avoid ambiguous serialization and unit mismatches
Improve resilience of import-mode adapter by adding fallback wrappers for compiled-backend modules (e.g.
RRTMG) and clearer error messages with install guidance
Introduce benchmark tests for core numerics (advection-diffusion
radiation stepping
EBM integration) and track regressions in CI
Expand unit coverage for `Process`/`TimeDependentProcess` tree composition edge cases (subprocess ordering
diagnostics propagation
timestep coupling)
Add contract tests that compare `climlab.radiation.insolation` and `climlab.solar.insolation` outputs to prevent API drift between mirrored functions
Strengthen docs for plugin users with task-oriented MCP examples (common workflows
expected payload shapes
failure modes)
Add static quality gates (ruff/black + mypy on selected modules) to reduce maintenance risk in large core files
Create a reproducible dev environment file for plugin + core package integration tests (pin fastmcp/pydantic and climlab optional deps)
Add runtime capability introspection endpoint in MCP (reports available optional modules/features) so clients can adapt automatically
Refactor oversized modules incrementally (`model/ebm.py`
`process/process.py`) into smaller units with focused tests to reduce complexity and improve extensibility
Add numerical-validation regression fixtures (known climatology/energy-budget outputs) to catch silent scientific changes across releases

success_factors: Workflow reached terminal success state and executed all planned nodes (download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize).
Resilient fallback behavior: after git clone failure, pipeline continued via zip-based source ingestion and still produced MCP artifacts.
Import-mode adapter strategy matched repository characteristics (Python package with low intrusiveness risk, import feasibility 0.86).
Generated plugin booted successfully (service_health=healthy, stdio transport), validating minimum operational viability.
failure_reasons: Primary source acquisition failed due to network/connectivity issue to github.com:443 (curl 28 timeout) during clone.

Metadata extraction inconsistency: execution/analysis fields report zero files and missing packaging files despite detailed state proving 105 files and pyproject/setup.py; indicates telemetry/instrumentation mismatch.
Validation depth was limited: original project tests marked failed/not executed while MCP plugin test passed, reducing confidence in scientific correctness of exposed tools.

node_performance.download_time: Download node experienced retry/failure behavior (75s timeout observed) but recovered via fallback; likely dominant latency contributor.
node_performance.analysis_time: Analysis completed with meaningful module mapping and risk profiling; moderate runtime inferred from total duration.
node_performance.generation_time: Generation was efficient (7 files created, import adapter, endpoint generation), but quality signals conflict (0 LOC/size metrics).
node_performance.test_time: Plugin health check was fast and passed; project-level tests effectively absent, so test stage was shallow.

resource_usage.memory_efficiency: Unknown due to missing metrics (reported 0 MB). No evidence of memory pressure, but observability is insufficient.
resource_usage.cpu_efficiency: Unknown due to missing metrics (reported 0%). Runtime profile suggests mostly I/O + static analysis with low CPU intensity.
resource_usage.disk_usage: Low-to-moderate expected footprint (repo ~105 files + generated plugin), but measured size telemetry is missing/zero.
